decisions.decision: Treat post-checkpoint amount/totals mismatch as in-scope for Phase 39-02 and fix before closing phase.

decisions.decision: Prefer normalized actual_amount (including numeric strings/decimals) for completed history rendering and item financial rollups.
decisions.rationale: Completion payload and downstream domain aggregation can carry decimal values that must remain authoritative.
